## What does this change?

<!-- New skill, an improvement, or a fix. Link any related issue. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Reads the foundations (camp-overview, camp-profile, camp-voice) rather than repeating them
- [ ] Asks about the camp first, then hands back an editable draft
- [ ] Any copy follows the voice rules in `skills/camp-voice/references/avoid-list.md`
- [ ] `name` is lowercase-hyphens and matches the folder; frontmatter is complete
- [ ] `SKILL.md` stays focused, with detail in `references/`
- [ ] Flags anything touching camper safety, supervision, or regulation
- [ ] No credentials or private camp data
